stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa reached on error · Top 5
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Andy Pages. Nolan Arenado to 3rd. Tim Tawa to 2nd.
